alibaba-group.summary: KFTC investigation (2024) into AliExpress + Temu Korean consumer-protection violations (counterfeit goods, deceptive product descriptions).

coupang.summary: KRW 140B (~$100M) KFTC fine (Jun 2024) on Coupang for manipulating product search rankings to favor private-label brands.

meta-platforms.summary: KRW 21.6B PIPC fine (Nov 2024) on Meta for collecting Korean users' political/health/sexual-orientation sensitive data without consent for targeted ads.
